top_signals.title: Venezuela rocked by two huge earthquakes
top_signals.summary: Local officials warn of fatalities as people left trapped under rubble
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Three ‘cybercrime as a service’ operations undercut by Microsoft, law enforcement
top_signals.summary: Microsoft touted its latest action against malware infrastructure as a new approach aimed at the full cybercrime "supply chain." Europol said more than 300 servers were targeted.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kalshi seeks funding at $40B valuation, nearly doubling last raise: FT
top_signals.summary: Kalshi is reportedly in talks to raise new capital at a $40 billion valuation, reflecting growing investor confidence in regulated prediction markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: German rail services resume after wireless communications outage
top_signals.summary: Deutsche Bahn said a nationwide disruption of railway services was tied to a malfunction in its 2G-based GSM-R communications system.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Health ministry worker indicted for stalking subordinate
top_signals.summary: According to the prosecution, the health ministry worker repeatedly messaged his subordinate, secretly photographed her and entered her home without permission.
